name: trans NV-04
description: trans NV-04 is a cardiovascular drug which shows a significant reduction in blood pressure and arterial stiffness.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in cardiovascular disorders and hypertension.
mechanismOfAction: trans-NV-04 promotes blood vessel relaxation, acts as an antioxidant and inhibits smooth muscle cell growth in blood vessels, factors contributing to build up of obstructive vascular plaques or atherosclerosis.
